title: Finances of Non-Government Non-Financial Public Limited Companies, 2024-25
description: Today, the Reserve Bank released the data relating to financial performance of non-government non-financial (NGNF) public limited companies during 2024-25 (https://data.rbi.org.in/#/dbie/reports/Statistics/Corporate%20Sector/Non-Government%20Non-Financial%20Public%20Limited%20Companies) based on audited annual accounts of select 7,992 companies, which reported in the Indian Accounting Standards (Ind-AS) format for three accounting years from 2022-23 to 2024-25, received from the Ministry of Corp
